added_items.final_wording: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.

source.title: Antenatal Care Standard
source.population: Pregnant women and adolescent girls receiving pre-conception or antenatal care.
source.setting: DoH-licensed healthcare providers delivering antenatal care in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for routine antenatal documentation in Abu Dhabi; partial for high-risk or complication-specific care and for use outside Abu Dhabi.

exact_location.heading: 1. Standard Scope and Purpose; 3.4 Antenatal Care; 3.4.1 Routine Antenatal Care

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines routine antenatal documentation, risk review at every visit, history and record review, patient concerns, shared decisions, counselling, care plans, and high-risk referral boundaries.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports routine antenatal identity, gestational context, history, risk reassessment, counselling, patient concerns, care-plan, record, follow-up, and clinician referral documentation.

added_items.final_wording: Specifies gestation-linked weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal heart, fundal height, fetal movement, laboratory, ultrasound, glucose-screening, counselling, and follow-up documentation.

source.title: Antenatal Care Standard
source.population: Pregnant women and adolescent girls receiving pre-conception or antenatal care.
source.setting: DoH-licensed healthcare providers delivering antenatal care in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for routine antenatal documentation in Abu Dhabi; partial for high-risk or complication-specific care and for use outside Abu Dhabi.

exact_location.heading: Appendix 1 — Routine Antenatal Screening and Care

source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies gestation-linked weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal heart, fundal height, fetal movement, laboratory, ultrasound, glucose-screening, counselling, and follow-up documentation.

added_items.rationale: Directly supports mapped weight, blood pressure, urine dipstick, fetal movement, fetal heart, fundal height, laboratory, ultrasound, OGTT, counselling, and gestation-linked follow-up fields.

added_items.final_wording: Defines conditions that require additional obstetric review and preserves escalation as a clinician decision rather than an automatic workflow output.
